title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Sanji, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yep... right on course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Smooth sailing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As you request- Ed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A special cold- pressed fruit juice, just for you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the tang of tangerines as its centerpiece, it's both healthy and beautifullying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wow, pretty! Thanks, Sanji.*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AAAHW! I'll work my fingers to the bone if it means being rewarded with that gorgeous smile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SlRP Xm:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NGH... Shaddap, wouldja?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What're you on about this time, cook?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Flirting with anything that moves day after day... FEH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like you can talk when you're napping in the middle of the day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do some work, ya bum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I'm awake, I'm stuck listening to some playboy's dumb pickup lines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey! No fighting, you two.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And where's my juice, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you even know what it means to be serious?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I believe what you mean to say is "Pardon me, might I please have my portion?" Try being polite!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys! Get her butts down here! I made drinks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hah?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: cast- away off the port bow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What're we gonna do, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A cast- away? Think he can sing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do you see an instru- ment?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh gosh, your shoulder and collar- bone might be broken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You probably have some cracked ribs too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wouldn't move that arm for at least a few weeks.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 28 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
